title: Scandal
overview: A young policeman of Japanese origin is assigned for the first time to patrol in New York together with a tough veteran who uses unconventional methods when dealing with criminals.

title: Manhattan Connection
overview: Tough, hot, blonde policewoman Debbie joins Eddie and Mad Ball's squad. Eddie falls for her hard. They get to investigate a new dangerous local drug cartel.

title: City of Vice
overview: A series of rapes in New York put a journalist and the police patrol on alert but the murderous gang is about to finish them off.

title: Cop Killer
overview: Eddie and Mad Bull are after a mysterious cop killer that uses a robotic exoskeleton to kill cops out of some kind of revenge.
